CVE-2013-4420.title: Multiple directory traversal vulnerabilities in the (1) tar_extra ...
CVE-2013-4420.description: Multiple directory traversal vulnerabilities in the (1) tar_extract_glob and (2) tar_extract_all functions in libtar 1.2.20 and earlier allow remote attackers to overwrite arbitrary files via a .. (dot dot) in a crafted tar file.
